content.query:
--drop EXTERNAL table dbo.fact_transactions

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.fact_transactions
(
    transaction_id VARCHAR(100),
    txn_date DATE,
    client_id VARCHAR(100),
    card_id VARCHAR(100),
    merchant_id VARCHAR(100),
    amount FLOAT,
    use_chip VARCHAR(20),
    errors VARCHAR(500),
    txn_year INT,
    txn_month_name VARCHAR(20),
    silver_load_time DATETIME2
)
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'fact_transactions',
    DATA_SOURCE = MyDataLake,
    FILE_FORMAT = DeltaFormat
);

select * from fact_transactions
